candidates.why: Appears within the operating expense breakdown, not clearly tied to a selected COGS bucket. There is no COGS final_choice row to which this could be added separately, and the row does not indicate cost of sales / cost of revenue specifically.

Shown as a separate operating line before EBIT, but there is no selected COGS bucket and nothing in the label ties it specifically to COGS / cost of sales. More consistent with broad operating overhead in this statement.

variables.notes: No dedicated COGS row was previously selected. The visible D&A rows are operating-section items but are not clearly cost-of-sales-specific, so none should be added to COGS.

candidates.why: This appears to be a component within the selected parent row 'Operating expenses' because the operating expense subtotal reconciles using this line together with other listed components. Adding it separately would likely double count.

This is presented as a separate operating line outside the selected 'Operating expenses' bucket and rolls separately into 'Operating (Income)/Expense - Net'. Since the earlier XSGA mapping explicitly selected 'Operating expenses' and excluded depreciation/amortization rows, this depreciation should be added separately later.

variables.notes: Selected 'Operating expenses' is the XSGA reference bucket. 'Amortization of Contract Costs' appears embedded within that bucket, while 'Depreciation' is a separate same-level operating line before EBIT and should be added separately.
